# Peptide Central

> India's most trusted source for research-grade peptides. 99% HPLC-verified purity. COA with every order. COD available pan-India.

## About

Peptide Central (peptidecentral.in) supplies research-grade synthetic peptides in India. Every batch is independently HPLC-verified with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) included. Delivery available pan-India via COD, UPI, and IMPS. WhatsApp ordering at +91 97588 88951.

## Products

We stock 20+ peptides across five categories:

- **Fat Loss**: Retatrutide, Tirzepatide, AOD-9604, Tesamorelin, CJC-1295 No DAC, Ipamorelin, CJC/Ipamorelin Blend
- **Recovery**: BPC-157, TB-500, KPV
- **Anti-Aging / Skin**: GHK-Cu, SS-31, Epitalon
- **Brain / Cognitive**: Semax, Selank, Pinealon
- **Longevity**: MOTS-C, Epitalon, SS-31, KLOW Blend

Full catalog: https://peptidecentral.in/products/

## Disclaimer

All products are for in-vitro research use only. Not for human consumption. Peptide Central complies with Indian research chemical regulations.
